title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.1080
text:
*260.1080.  Report to legislative committees. — The department shall compile information from manufacturers and issue an electronic report to the committee in each house of the general assembly having primary jurisdiction over environmental matters not later than March first of each year.
(L. 2008 S.B. 720) 
*Contingent expiration date, see § 260.1092
